anthropic.label: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.notes: Anthropic has ~2h session rolling + weekly limits. sessionWindowHours is configurable — set to 2 if you want tighter tracking. Tune based on console.anthropic.com usage page.

openai.label: OpenAI (Codex)
openai.notes: Codex Pro tier. Session window is 5h for Codex. Data comes from ~/.codex/state_5.sqlite. Tune based on chatgpt.com/codex/settings/usage.
